/usr/bin/ar qc libfilepattern.a CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/pattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/interface/filepattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/internal/internal_pattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/internal/filepattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/internal/stringpattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/internal/vectorpattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/external/external_pattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/external/external_filepattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/external/external_stringpattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/external/external_vectorpattern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/util/fs_stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/util/sort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/filepattern.dir/util/vector_parser.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfilepattern.a
